/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,librover_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o librover_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/rover_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/rover_msgs/msg/detail/motors_command__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sachin/ros2_rover/build/rover_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: librover_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
